/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ahfl_tooling_profiling_tests.dir/unit/tooling/profiling/profiling.cpp.o -o ahfl_tooling_profiling_tests  ../src/tooling/profiling/libahfl_tooling_profiling.a
